headline: There are just a few spaces left at our NYC Pub Quiz. Did we mention the prizes?
body_text:
There are less than two weeks to go until the FT Alphaville Pub Quiz lands back in New York City. There are still a few spots left, but not a lot — so get in touch soon if you’d like to attend:

If the prospect of financial trivia and the chance to see Robin IRL isn’t enough of a draw [ed note: umm more likely to put people off], how about some prizes?

There’s the traditional winners’ mugs, allowing you to flex on your colleagues every time you sip your drink:

And then, as usual, the winners will be the first to get their hands on a new FTAV swag shop offering. Here’s a sneak preview:

What could it all mean? Sign up and be the first to find out.

Further reading:— The FT Alphaville pub quiz returns to New York City this November
